name: Amass
description: Imports attack-surface / subdomain enumeration results from OWASP Amass (https://github.com/owasp-amass/amass). Each discovered name becomes an ASSET (hostname + resolved IP). Offline mode: parse an `amass enum -json` output file (JSON lines or array). Live mode: if `domain` is set and the `amass` binary is on the worker PATH, runs `amass enum -d <domain> -json`. No DB access in run.py (worker-safe). Run live only within an authorised engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to an `amass enum -json` output file (JSON lines or a JSON array) to import.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.help: Live mode: domain to enumerate with the local `amass` binary (amass enum -d <domain> -json).
